item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response opens with a clear brake, identifies the repeated downstream overlay pattern across invitation, form, signage, and SMS, and prevents the parking reminder from becoming another permanent local patch. Although it includes a one-time emergency SMS sentence, it explicitly frames it as temporary and moves the durable fix upstream into a consolidated guest arrival guide covering entrance, sign-in, tea-break flow, and parking."}
